pages.text_excerpt: Parliamentary activities - Jonathan Davies MP - Jonathan Davies MP Skip to main content Jonathan Davies MP Serving the people of Mid Derbyshire Join Get Involved Donate Home Contact In parliament In the constituency Newsletter Testimonials Frequently Asked Questions Youth Survey Report More Menu Parliamentary activities About my latest work in Westminster The role of an MP is extensive. Most weeks, I spend Monday to Thursday in Westminster doing parliamentary work such as asking questions in debates and scrutinising new legislation line by line. As well as the well-known events like Prime Minister’s Questions, there are plenty of other debates and opportunities for MPs to raise issues on behalf of their constituents and get a response from a minister. Here, you will be able to find what I am doing to ensure that you are better represented. Westminster news See more Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site Westminster news 03 March 2026 Championing the Belper Mills to the Prime Minister Westminster news 02 March 2026 Celebrating Nuclear Week with an event for Derby’s Rolls-Royce Westminster news 02 February 2026 Supporting grassroots music venues with business rates Supporting Midland Mainline Electrification It’s time to update the BBC to bring it into the new era Protect the UK from Russian Shadow Fleets Support our farmers and rural communities Put more neighbourhood police in our rural communities It is time to end the need for food banks Raising unpaid carers’ concerns to Minister of Care Bringing back creative subjects into our schools as part of Curriculum Review More prison spaces and rehabilatation of our inmates Holding Jhoots Pharmacies to account Reforming our educational assessment system to broaden our young peoples’ life chances Pushing for a sustained and lasting peace in Gaza Welcoming free breakfast clubs and 30 hours of free childcare Defending our underseas cables and national security Securing biodiversity in the A38 expansion Leading debate on the future of our libraries Balancing benefits of AI while protecting copyright Protecting creative industries from Artificial Intelligence Defence in US-UK trade Planning and Infrastructure Bill Creative industry and AI Derbyshire MPs on SEND SEND: Home-to-School transport Modern Day Slavery in UK supply chains Ukraine and global food security Investment into East Midlands buses SEND in Derbyshire Jonathan Davies MP Contact details Email: jonathan.davies.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by S McIntyre on behalf of Jonathan Davies, Units 5-6 Heritage Business Centre, Derby Road, Belper, DE56 1SW. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site - Jonathan Davies MP - Jonathan Davies MP
pages.h1: Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site
pages.meta_description: Serving the people of Mid Derbyshire
pages.text_excerpt: Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site - Jonathan Davies MP - Jonathan Davies MP Skip to main content Jonathan Davies MP Serving the people of Mid Derbyshire Join Get Involved Donate Home Contact In parliament In the constituency Newsletter Testimonials Frequently Asked Questions Youth Survey Report More Menu 3rd March, 2026 Improving local education about our Unesco world heritage site Jonathan Davies MP chairing the Unesco World Heritage APPG. On Tuesday I chaired another meeting of the parliamentary group on UNESCO World Heritage Sites. The session focused on education and awareness, and what steps we can take to improve local community connection to world heritage sites. We were joined by fantastic speakers from across the UK who shared their experience of delivering educational and cultural events and the benefits these events have on increasing awareness of local history and of the world heritage sites, improving community engagement and encouraging more people to visit. That local education is fundamental to raising the awareness of the values and benefits of world heritages sites and these sites are perfectly placed to deliver an enriching educational experience. I look forward to working on this further over the coming months. Follow on social media Jonathan Davies MP Contact details Email: jonathan.davies.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by S McIntyre on behalf of Jonathan Davies, Units 5-6 Heritage Business Centre, Derby Road, Belper, DE56 1SW. ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
